properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let me walk with you, As I journey to this life Searching for a meaning as each moment passes by Let the hand of time be like footprints in the sand As I carry you from the dawn to setting sun…

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: With just one hand we can travel far together One's life sharing in love I will hold you forever Yes, I love you with all my life…

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There'll be many crossroads as we walk along the way There'll be many questions as we live life day by day This will never matter if the Lord will always be there He will surely find the answers 'coz He cares

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Yes, I love you with all my life… Yes, I love you with all my life…
